name: harvest
description: Every scraper you were paying a SaaS for — free, self-hosted, and yours.

scripts.test: node -e "const {extractEmailsFromHtml}=require('./lib/email-extract.cjs');const e=extractEmailsFromHtml('x jane [at] acme [dot] com');if(e.length<2)throw new Error('email-extract failed: '+JSON.stringify(e));console.log('email-extract ok:',e.join(', '))" && node engines/index.cjs --list
